title: The Last Customer
content: Just as Mia finished cleaning the café and prepared to lock the doors, a man entered quietly asking if they were still open. Although exhausted after a long shift, she decided to serve him one final coffee. The café was nearly silent except for soft jazz music playing in the background and the distant sound of traffic outside. While preparing the drink, Mia noticed how tired the customer looked, as if he had experienced an unusually difficult day. They exchanged only a few words, yet the atmosphere felt strangely calm and human. After he left, Mia remained alone inside the empty café for a moment, reflecting on how brief interactions sometimes carried unexpected emotional weight.
